user.title: WhatsApp Media Processor
user.description: Connect Home Assistant service actions to the WhatsApp Media Processor add-on.

data_description.base_url: The HTTP URL exposed by the add-on, for example http://192.168.1.229:9000.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the add-on. Check that the add-on is running and that the URL is reachable from Home Assistant.
error.invalid_url: Enter an absolute http or https URL.

abort.already_configured: This add-on URL is already configured.

process_audio.name: Process WhatsApp audio
process_audio.description: Decrypt a WhatsApp audio message and return the transcription.

code.name: Media key
code.description: The WhatsApp media key, base64 encoded.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for processing, in seconds.

process_document.name: Process WhatsApp document
process_document.description: Decrypt a WhatsApp document and save it to the add-on's Paperless consume directory.

code.name: Media key
code.description: The WhatsApp media key, base64 encoded.

filename.name: Filename
filename.description: Filename to use for the saved document.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for processing, in seconds.

process_image.name: Process WhatsApp image
process_image.description: Decrypt a WhatsApp image or sticker and return OpenAI image-analysis output.

code.name: Media key
code.description: The WhatsApp media key, base64 encoded.

text.name: Caption or request
text.description: Text context to send with the image.

media_type.name: Media type
media_type.description: Use image for photos and sticker for WhatsApp stickers.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for processing, in seconds.

process_video.name: Process WhatsApp video
process_video.description: Run a base64-encoded ffmpeg command through the add-on.

user_id.name: User ID
user_id.description: Optional user identifier to return with the add-on response.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for processing, in seconds.
